Traditional long reach watering can from Kent & Stowe allows for easy and precise feeding and watering of plants from a distance. This classic Kent & Stowe 9L Metal Watering Can in galvanised steel is ideal for the everyday watering and feeding of the whole garden with its greater capacity.
